objective: Implement defensive Steam UI guards for SteamOS and release finalization (1.5.0)
design_decisions: Added predicate helpers to detect missing Steam internals. Wrapped patch registrations in try/catch to make each independently optional. Surfaced patch install status in the settings diagnostics panel. Bumped version to 1.5.0. Added SteamOS documentation to README.
results: All tests pass. Defensive guards prevent hard failures when Steam internals are missing. Documentation and version updated.
